title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Signal Processing: Characterization & classification of
signals,typical Signal Processing operations, example of typical signals.
Time Domain Representation of Signals & Systems: Discrete Time
Signals, Operations on Sequences, the sampling process, Quantization,
Discrete-Time systems, Time Domain characterization of LTI Discrete-
Time systems, Convolution and impulse response

title: Module 2
content:
Transform-Domain Representation of Signals: Discrete Fourier
Transform (DFT), DFT properties, computation of the DFT of real
sequences, Fast Fourier transform (FFT).

title: Module 3
content:
Filtering and Noise Reduction:Types of filters (low-pass, high-pass,
band-pass, band-stop), Design and implementation of digital filters,
Noise reduction techniques.

title: Module 4
content:
Wavelet Transform: Introduction to wavelets, Continuous wavelet
transform (CWT), Discrete wavelet transform (DWT).
Sensor Data Processing: Processing data from cameras, LIDAR, and
IMUs, Sensor fusion techniques, Real-time data processing.
